author: Vijay Patel
text: We are hiring! Looking for a founding AI/ML Engineer to join us at Krama AI in Bengaluru. Experience: 2-4 years. We offer 18-24 LPA + equity. Apply here: https://krama.ai/careers/founding-ml

text: Excited to share that I have started a new role as Senior Product Manager! Grateful to all my mentors and colleagues who helped me along the way.
